category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and lawn/garden electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Tanzania.

title.en: China-to-Tanzania Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入坦桑尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入坦尚尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Tanzania TBS national standards, mandatory PVoC pre-export verification, Certificate of Conformity, TBS mark, TCRA radio approval for cordless tools, and applicable substance and battery considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与坦桑尼亚 TBS 国家标准、强制 PVoC 出口前验证、符合性证书、TBS 标志、无绳工具 TCRA 无线电批准及适用物质与电池要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與坦尚尼亞 TBS 國家標準、強制 PVoC 出口前驗證、符合性證書、TBS 標誌、無繩工具 TCRA 無線電批准及適用物質與電池要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Tanzania law, TBS standards, PVoC scheme requirements, TCRA radio rules, and destination enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、符合性评定机构裁定、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行坦桑尼亚法律、TBS 标准、PVoC 方案要求、TCRA 无线电规则及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、符合性評定機構裁定、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行坦尚尼亞法律、TBS 標準、PVoC 方案要求、TCRA 無線電規則及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Tanzania, the mandatory baseline is conformity with TBS national standards (which adopt IEC/EN, including the IEC 62841 series) verified through the TBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) scheme, a Certificate of Conformity at the port of entry such as Dar es Salaam, and use of the TBS mark; cordless tools with radio functions also require TCRA type approval. China GB/T 3883 evidence is the domestic baseline but does not by itself satisfy these obligations.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入坦桑尼亚，强制基线是符合 TBS 国家标准（采用 IEC/EN，包括 IEC 62841 系列），并通过 TBS 出口前符合性验证（PVoC）方案验证、在达累斯萨拉姆等入境口岸取得符合性证书并使用 TBS 标志；带无线电功能的无绳工具还须取得 TCRA 型号核准。中国 GB/T 3883 证据是境内基线，但本身不能满足上述义务。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入坦尚尼亞，強制基線是符合 TBS 國家標準（採用 IEC/EN，包括 IEC 62841 系列），並通過 TBS 出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）方案驗證、在達累斯薩拉姆等入境口岸取得符合性證書並使用 TBS 標誌；帶無線電功能的無繩工具還須取得 TCRA 型號核准。中國 GB/T 3883 證據是境內基線，但本身不能滿足上述義務。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Rows are AI-generated drafts pending named-reviewer verification of TBS standards, PVoC scope, and TCRA rules before human_reviewed can be true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag; sources are official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, or primary legal sources, and last_verified must be updated before human_reviewed is set true.
